title: helichrysum zeyheri
intro: Helichrysum zeyheri, also known as the Zeyher's Everlastings or Zeyher's Helichrysum, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for various health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum zeyheri include its ability to reduce inflammation and pain, improve skin conditions, and boost the immune system. The plant's herbal preparations, such as essential oils and extracts, can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
